data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Instagram incorporates encryption to secure user data during transit and storage.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data encryption, HTTPS for secure communications.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Offers 2FA to add a layer of security preventing unauthorized access to user accounts.
data.technical_spec: SMS and authenticator apps for verification.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts ongoing security audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated testing and ethical hacking protocols.

data.title: Phishing and Scam Detection
data.description: Monitors and prevents attempts to conduct phishing and scams using automated tools.
data.technical_spec: AI-based detection tools and manual verification processes.

data.title: SOC2 Compliance
data.description: Compliance with the SOC2 standard to ensure appropriate controls over data security and privacy.
data.technical_spec: Adherence to strict access control and security measures.
